# Developer Portfolio Website - Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Modern, responsive developer portfolio website built with Next.js, TailwindCSS, and dark mode support.

## Completed Steps
- [ ] Project scaffolding
- [ ] Component development
- [ ] Dependency installation
- [ ] Build and testing
- [ ] Documentation

## Features to Implement
- Homepage with hero section
- About Me section
- Projects showcase
- Contact form
- Navbar and Footer components
- Dark mode support
- Fully responsive design
